column1: # Nano Sweep 17 — softcap=20 follow-up + MLR retest (2026-04-24)

# - Earlier Mini rounds suggested MATRIX_LR=0.030 can outperform 0.040 on this host.
# 1) Replicate best softcap=20 on a third seed (1337).
# 2) Re-test MATRIX_LR=0.030 under the updated softcap=20 + ADAM_WD=0.065 setup.
